method: WebSearch + direct API queries (api.sketchfab.com/v3, zenodo.org/api) run 2026-07-08; counts are from live API responses, not estimates
blocking_summary: No licensed, downloadable, corpus-scale 3D/RTI/photogrammetry data exists for Linear A-bearing objects, CMS seals/impressions, or Anetaki material. The single relevant open item (1 CC-BY Minoan seal mesh) is below any calibration threshold (known-join/allograph calibration needs >= tens of ground-truthed meshes).

sources.source: CMS (Corpus der minoischen und mykenischen Siegel) via iDAI.objects Arachne
sources.content: ~12k Aegean seals/sealings, 2D photographs + drawings + impression photos; free web viewing, free registration for higher resolution
sources.modality_3d: none published at corpus scale (a Heidelberg '3D-forensic' pilot exists; dataset not released)
sources.license: no explicit CC statement on images; DAI/CMS rights reserved; bulk redistribution not authorized

sources.source: MUSINT II virtual museum (Haghia Triada sealings + Florence/Rome seals; Sketchfab user amjasink)
sources.content: 43 photogrammetry/laser-scan models (measured 2026-07-08 by paging the API)
sources.downloadable: 0/43 (isDownloadable=false on every model; license field null = all rights reserved)

sources.content: q='minoan seal' downloadable=true -> 2 hits: 'Minoan seal MUSINT II' (CC-BY, 400k faces, n=1 seal) + Phaistos Disc replica (CC-BY); q='linear a minoan' downloadable=true -> 1 hit (a stirrup jar, CC-BY-NC-SA, not an inscription corpus)
sources.status: USABLE_BUT_NO_POWER (n=1 relevant mesh; no ground-truth joins/allographs)

sources.content: q='Linear A' AND (photogrammetry OR 3D model OR RTI) -> total=2, both Maltese-stone items, irrelevant; q='minoan seal' AND (3D OR scan) -> total=0
browser 3D viewer for selected exhibits; no download endpoint
sources.license: Hellenic Ministry of Culture; Greek antiquities imagery requires ministry permission (L.4858/2021 regime)

sources.source: Anetaki plot imagery (Kanta/Nakassis/Palaima/Perna; INSTAP-supported; Ariadne Suppl. 5, 2024/2025; ivory scepter 2024)
sources.content: 2D publication photographs only; no 3D/RTI dataset released; scepter unpublished in 3D

sources.source: Focus-stacked macro-photogrammetry workflow for small Aegean inscriptions (J. Cultural Heritage 2022, incl. 3 Linear A items, ~30 micron density)
sources.content: method paper; paywalled; no open dataset repository found on Zenodo or elsewhere

sources.source: 'Material Insights' (2025): structured-light scans of 98 CMS modern impressions + 27 original seals/sealings
sources.content: study exists; scan dataset not openly released
sources.status: SOURCE_BLOCKED (candidate for a data-request; see report)

sources.content: 802 docs / 376 signs, sign bounding boxes only; no stroke vectors, no 3D; CC BY-NC-SA
sources.status: IN_REPO_2D_BBOX_ONLY (WP-E already established aspect channel AUC 0.57-0.60 = no identity power)
